authorization_guards.table_query_guard: Warehouse::authorizedToViewWarehouses() returns no rows without view all warehouses
authorization_guards.import_visibility_note: Core Resource JSON currently exposes import for Importable resources when create is allowed. import warehouses is reserved for explicit future hooks.

builder_notes: master_data_global resources must register explicit global permission UI entries
do not generate own/team permissions without ownership/team schema
Resourceable trait is required on the model for first-class Resource behavior
permission changes require optimize:clear and permission:cache-reset
Language labels must use leaf translation keys to avoid JSON object rendering in UI
Custom-field-capable resources should expose /settings/fields/{resourceName} through the Core Settings Fields UI
stale generated permissions must be cleaned from database, not only removed from code
Cloneable resources must provide both the Cloneable contract and clone(Model, userId) implementation
row/bulk actions must be explicitly registered in Resource::actions() and authorized with policy gates

delete.authorization: delete any warehouse via Gate delete

permissions_cleanup.reason: Remove stale Warehouse-related permissions generated during early MVP iterations, including generic duplicate export labels.

table_columns.note: description is now index-visible so normal role users see the useful master-data columns without needing column customization rights.
